title: Community and nonprofit
description: An impact-led page flow that establishes the mission, proves the work, tells human stories, and creates clear ways to participate.

selection.description: Choose for charities, schools, community programs, foundations, and impact organizations.
avoidWhen: The primary task is transactional shopping or application administration.

title: Editorial and portfolio
description: A media-forward page flow that leads with selected work, expands into stories or projects, and closes with social proof and an inquiry path.

selection.description: Choose for studios, photographers, agencies, creators, publications, and case-study-driven portfolios.
queries: Create a case study driven studio site
avoidWhen: The page has no meaningful visual or story collection.

title: Service business
description: A practical conversion flow that explains the offer, demonstrates trust, reduces uncertainty, and routes visitors toward an inquiry.

selection.description: Choose for local services, consultancies, trades, salons, repair businesses, and appointment-led companies.
queries: Create a quote-focused local business page
avoidWhen: The product is primarily self-serve ecommerce or a content publication.
